objects.query: SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, Description, Id, Name FROM FulfillmentWorkspace
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, Id, Name, UsageType FROM FulfillmentStepDefinitionGroup
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, ErrorCode, FlowDefinitionName, Id, IntegrationDefinition.DeveloperName, Name, RetriesAllowed, RetryPolicy, StepType FROM FulfillmentFalloutRule

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, EstimatedDuration, EstimatedDurationUnit, FlowDefinition, Id, StepType, JeopardyThreshold, JeopardyThresholdUnit, Name, IntegrationDefinition.DeveloperName FROM FulfillmentStepJeopardyRule

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, AssignedToId, ExecuteOnRuleId, FlowDefinitionName, Id, IntegrationDefinitionNameId, Name, OmniscriptName, ResumeOnRuleId, RunAsUserId, Scope, StepDefinitionGroupId, StepType, UsageType, StepDefinitionGroup.Name FROM FulfillmentStepDefinition

SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, DependencyScope, DependsOnStepDefinitionId, FulfillmentStepDefinitionId, Id, Name, DependsOnStepDefinition.Name, FulfillmentStepDefinition.Name FROM FulfillmentStepDependencyDef
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, FulfillmentStepDefinitionGroupId, FulfillmentWorkspaceId, Id, ShowOrder, FulfillmentWorkspace.Name, FulfillmentStepDefinitionGroup.Name FROM FulfillmentWorkspaceItem
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, DestinationProductId, Id, Name, Priority, SourceProductId, SourceProduct.StockKeepingUnit, DestinationProduct.StockKeepingUnit FROM ProductFulfillmentDecompRule
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, Action, FulfillmentStepDefnGroupId, Id, Name, ProductId, Product.StockKeepingUnit FROM ProductFulfillmentScenario
SELECT DecompositionScope, FulfillmentQtyCalcMethod, Name, StockKeepingUnit FROM Product2
